case_title: MAIKE VANESSA BUCHNER VS. MARK NORRELL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUCHNER, MAIKE VANESSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORRELL, MARK $2,466.60 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,531.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,575.82 FILED BY BUCHNER, MAIKE VANESSA AS TO DEFENDANT NORRELL, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
